discussion_notes.summary: Governance walk 2026-05-08 PM. 13 indexed pending + 6 runner-only. Manifest reclassifications: EXQ-490f Q-040 weakens->non_contributory and EXQ-514f (both runs) SD-049/SD-015 weakens->non_contributory; both reflect pre-MECH-307 conjunction-architecture confound (the four-gap wiring fault). Per-claim directions applied as-recorded for EXQ-445h (SD-032b does_not_support, MECH-258/260 supports), EXQ-141b (MECH-111 weakens), EXQ-483b (SD-037/MECH-280/MECH-281 supports). Diagnostic non_contributory entries (EXQ-476c MECH-269 cluster, EXQ-536a/536b ARC-030 cluster, EXQ-537/537a/523b SD-029 cluster) accepted as-classified. evidence_quality_note refinements added to all 21 affected claims capturing the architectural reads. Q-041 + Q-042 hold_pending_v3_substrate decisions logged with substrate-specific gates: Q-041 = SD-032c/d + MECH-258 + MECH-204; Q-042 = MECH-258 + StepHarness retest cohort (EXQ-475a/483c/490g/471a/524a). Strategic redirect: sleep substrate (MECH-204 / SD-049 sleep loop / SD-017 cluster) is the top-priority unblocker. Tier-1 StepHarness retest authoring (EXQ-530b ARC-016 + EXQ-514g SD-049 wider seeds) approved for /queue-experiment hand-off. Sleep-substrate audit approved as next concrete step. V3-EXQ-433f (no manifest, cloud-1 silent-fail) NOT marked discussed -- needs /diagnose-errors.

discussion_notes.subject: Three runner-only-pending-review items resolved by /diagnose-errors triage.

Manifest at runs/v3_exq_244a_mech165_replay_diversity_validation_v3/manifest.json (status=PASS, evidence_direction=supports, claim_ids_tested=[MECH-165]) -- already PASS-classified in INDEX.md. discussion_notes.v3_exq_538: HELD pending prerequisites. SIGTERM exit -15 mid-run on ree-cloud-1 (24 min in, 0 manifest). Script supersedes V3-EXQ-514f (SD-049 Phase 2 reef behavioural validation, sleep-on ablation). Per Friday PM governance cycle, 538 is part of the Tier-3 cohort (490e/f, 524, 536-cluster, 514f cohort) gated on MECH-307 substrate landing and Tier-1 retests (530b, 514g) clearing. EXQ-539 MECH-307 commit-gating discriminative ran today and FAILed (ARM_ON   liking=2711 pred_writes=2711 z_beta_exc=0.1506 -- substrate fires but commit-chain still inert), so MECH-307 alone does not unblock 538. EXQ-514g not yet queued. Holding 538 until: (1) V3-EXQ-514g lands and clears Tier-1; (2) 539 review surfaces next-step substrate; (3) sleep-substrate audit per recent strategic redirect. Reminder injected into v3_exq_538 script docstring + WORKSPACE_STATE.
discussion_notes.v3_exq_433f: 5h17min run on ree-cloud-1, runner classified UNKNOWN because output flat JSON synced after runner_status bookkeeping window. Flat JSON is real and complete: outcome=FAIL, evidence_direction=inconclusive_insufficient_events on SD-029 + MECH-256, C0 (gate) FAIL (agent_caused_trials_sufficient=False in 3/4 seeds: 15, 7, 20, 3 vs target 20). Same monomodal-policy / V_s monostrategy substrate-ceiling pattern as 433/433a/433b/470 (memory: 'EXQ-433/433a/433b/470 all reclassified non_contributory because monomodal policy can't generate balanced agent-vs-env event distributions for C2/C3 measurement. Hold pending MECH-269 V_s landing'). Reef enrichment substrate (SD-050) was supposed to break monostrategy but did not produce balanced events at this scale. Manifest evidence_direction reclassified non_contributory pending user confirmation; runner_status entry reclassified UNKNOWN -> FAIL since the flat JSON is now visible. Note: this script writes only flat JSON, no runs/<run_id>/manifest.json -- the indexer does not pick it up; treated as runner-only entry.

discussion_notes.subject: MECH-204 V3 closure on F1: four-experiment arc reviewed in this session and discussed with user. V3-EXQ-541 (legacy capture-only consumer) FAILed within-cycle no-op (mean_abs_delta=9e-8) -- already flipped evidence_direction=superseded earlier this session; preserved as architectural diagnosis that drove F1 design. V3-EXQ-541a (F1 substrate first run) PASSed C1+C2 (mean_abs_delta 3.6e-3, four orders better) but FAILed C3 cross-arm divergence; surfaced the within-cycle washout that step-size sweep would address. V3-EXQ-541b (5-arm step-size sweep at 4 cycles) PASSed C1+C2+C3 in every arm with clean monotone dose-response (step 0.05 -> 0.31%, 0.10 -> 0.63%, 0.25 -> 1.56%, 0.50 -> 3.13%) but FAILed C4 strict 5% threshold; identified the cycle-count washout dimension. V3-EXQ-541c (16 cycles per run, 4x exposure) PASSed all four criteria: cycle-count dose-response confirmed F1-sufficient (~2.9x divergence growth per 4x cycle increase, sub-linear but firmly NOT a plateau); ARM_4 step=0.5 cleared 5% C4 at 9.03% in 3/3 seeds; ARM_3 step=0.25 came in at 4.51%; tracking_quality monotonically improved 0.842 -> 0.921 across step arms; zero overshoot. Per REM-precision lit-pull SYNTHESIS dispatch case #1, F1+step-tuning is the operative MECH-204 architecture for V3; Phase 7 / Option B deferred to V4. Default rem_precision_recalibration_step bumped 0.1 -> 0.25 in REEConfig (high end of biologically defensible band per Q-042 Option A). MECH-204 V3 closure complete; sleep_substrate_plan.md GAP-1 status -> done.

Sleep substrate Phase 2 GAP-2 first owner-EXQ landed. V3-EXQ-265a (SD-017 SWS/REM methods validation under Phase 2 substrate stack: SD-016 div loss + V_s + anchor sets + SD-039 payload + sleep loop) PASSed all four criteria. C1 sws_writes>0 in 3/3 WITH_SLEEP seeds (mean=8.0). C2 with_sleep mean slot diversity 0.257 > 0.10 threshold. C3 rem_rollouts>0 in 3/3 seeds (mean=6.0). C4 (redesigned as signed |diff|>0.05 between WITH/WITHOUT_SLEEP, either direction informative) PASSed in 2/3 seeds with informative within-cohort heterogeneity: seed 42 sleep ADDED diversity (0.266 vs 0.175, diff 0.090); seed 49 saturated near-tie (0.365 vs 0.358, diff 0.007); seed 56 sleep COLLAPSED diversity (~0 vs 0.194, diff 0.194). Either direction satisfied C4 per the docstring interpretation grid. The cross-seed heterogeneity confirms the substrate is doing real but seed-sensitive work -- worth flagging for the multi-claim 436 and discriminative-pair 503 successors that need to handle this variability. V3-EXQ-265 manifest flipped to evidence_direction=superseded with note explaining the SD-016 attention-uniformity confound that motivated the retest (C4 reversal in 265 was driven by collapsed slots regardless of sleep, not by genuine SWS effect on diversity). sleep_substrate_plan.md GAP-2 owner-EXQ list: 265a done; 418c/436a/500a/503a still outstanding (deferred per session-context discipline; remaining 4 to be queued in fresh session(s) using the 5-flag Phase 2 template recorded in the 2026-05-09T19:49Z decision log).

Reclassification triage following ARC-065 (behavioral-diversity-generation pathway) cluster registration on 2026-05-10. User flagged that experiments depending on behavioural diversity as INPUT can become non_contributory (not weakens) when the agent is in monomodal collapse and the substrate that would generate diversity (ARC-065 + MECH-313 + MECH-314 cluster) is not yet implemented. Reclassified three pending FAILs as non_contributory: V3-EXQ-418l (SD-017 sleep action-bias diversification, with_div=without_div bit-identical at ~0.0003 across all seeds -- nothing to diversify); V3-EXQ-436a (SD-017+ARC-045+MECH-166 sleep refinement of context-conditioned harm threshold, waking and SWS_THEN_REM bit-identical for slot_cosine_sim and harm_rate_dangerous in every seed -- sleep cannot refine bit-identical waking content); V3-EXQ-530c (ARC-016 precision-to-commit pathway, ARM_0 use_dacc=False vs ARM_1 use_dacc=True bit-identical at commit_rate=1.0 and precision=211.85 -- saturated commit policy makes precision-to-commit pathway untestable; supersedes the morning-digest /diagnose-errors deferral with the upstream-substrate explanation). V3-EXQ-141d (MECH-111 novelty drive ablation) NOT reclassified -- this experiment IS the diversity-generator test (per_seed_action_divergence ~56% but cell_gap and entropy_gap ~0); kept evidence_direction=weakens against MECH-111 alone, but added cross-link note tying its FAIL pattern to ARC-065 R1 BOTH-CHANNELS-NEEDED verdict (novelty bonus alone insufficient without LC-NE-tonic noise floor MECH-313). All four manifests now have evidence_direction_note set; cross-references to ARC-065 cluster, V3-EXQ-543b/c falsifier path, and SD-029 retest precedent (EXQ-433/433a/433b/470 same monomodal-collapse non_contributory pattern) recorded. arc_062_rule_apprehension_plan.md decision log updated and sleep_substrate_plan.md GAP-2 marked upstream-blocked-by ARC-065 substrate.

False-ERROR triage of two ARC-062 / ARC-065 substrate-readiness diagnostics. Both V3-EXQ-542 (ARC-062 Phase 1 gated-policy substrate-readiness, 5/5 PASS) and V3-EXQ-544 (MECH-313/ARC-065 stochastic_noise_floor substrate-readiness, 5/5 PASS) wrote PASS manifests to evidence/experiments/ but were classified ERROR by the runner with 'No runner sentinel emitted and no PASS/FAIL on stdout (exit=0)'. Root cause: scripts ended with print(f'result: {manifest[result]}') -- lowercase 'result:' which the runner stdout regex set (experiment_runner.py:69-79) does NOT match. Recognised tokens are 'verdict:', 'Status:', 'Done. Outcome:', '=== EXQ-... PASS ==='. Fix applied: replaced 'result:' -> 'verdict:' in v3_exq_542 / v3_exq_544 / v3_exq_545 (cascade prevention; v3_exq_545 was queued and would have produced the same false-ERROR on next runner pickup). v3_exq_546 carries the same bug but is owned by the implement-substrate-mech319 active claim and was left for that session to fix in-place to avoid concurrent edit conflict (flagged via WORKSPACE_STATE). NOT re-queueing 542 / 544: their PASS manifests are already in evidence/experiments/ with all 5 UCs PASS, so re-running would produce duplicate manifests for the same substrate-readiness scientific question. Marking them discussed here clears the pending_review.md backlog without polluting the evidence record. Smoke test on 544 confirmed the new 'verdict: PASS' line matches the runner regex; duplicate manifest from smoke removed. Other unaddressed ERRORs in runner_status.json (V3-EXQ-538 SD-049 Phase 2 reef sleep-on, V3-EXQ-495 MECH-163 V3 full-completion gate, V3-EXQ-449c MECH-074b BLA retrieval bias V_s-gated, V3-EXQ-455a SD-032a salience coordinator V_s-enabled) are deliberately held -- 538 has explicit DO-NOT-REQUEUE block in script docstring (already discussed 2026-05-08), 495 has DO-NOT-QUEUE block pending MECH-292/293 (substrate landed 2026-04-27 but full-completion-gate behavioural validation is still queued separately), 449c/455a are V_s-cascade-gated and deferred until MECH-269 V_s circuit lands. None of those four require a fix in this session; flagging here for the user to decide whether to mark them discussed in a future session.

Followup to the 12:13Z diagnose-errors session: the four deliberately-held ERRORs flagged for user review have now been marked discussed per user instruction. None are getting re-queued. Per-entry rationale: V3-EXQ-538 (SD-049 Phase 2 reef behavioural validation, sleep-on ablation paired to 514f) -- script docstring carries an explicit HOLD STATUS block 'DO NOT REQUEUE WITHOUT CHECKING THIS LIST' citing four prerequisites (Tier-1 V3-EXQ-530b under StepHarness, Tier-1 V3-EXQ-514g StepHarness wider seed sweep, MECH-307 substrate validation, sleep-substrate audit), and was already noted as marked discussed 2026-05-08T17:30Z under session diagnose-errors-244a-538-433f -- this entry merely makes the discussed status explicit in discussed_experiment_dirs. V3-EXQ-495 (MECH-163 V3 full-completion gate -- VTA / hippocampally-planned arm) -- script docstring carries an explicit DO-NOT-QUEUE block 'gated on MECH-292 + MECH-293 landing'. Note: MECH-292 ranked ghost-goal bank and MECH-293 waking ghost-goal probe search both landed 2026-04-27 with V3-EXQ-496 5/5 PASS and V3-EXQ-497 5/5 PASS respectively, so the DO-NOT-QUEUE rationale is now substrate-stale; behavioural validation of the V3 full-completion gate is still gated on a separate session that runs 3 conditions x 2 paradigms x 7 seeds (several hours). The held SIGTERM ERROR from 2026-04-28 reflected the pre-MECH-292/293 substrate state and is correctly held. V3-EXQ-449c (MECH-074b BLA retrieval bias on action selection, V_s-gated) and V3-EXQ-455a (SD-032a salience coordinator behavioural re-run with V_s runtime flags enabled) -- both are V_s-cascade-gated rerun successors of EXQ-449/455 awaiting MECH-269 V_s invalidation runtime as the upstream gate. MECH-269 Phase 1/2/3 substrates have all landed (per WORKSPACE_STATE history) but the cascade-validation EXQ V3-EXQ-476 has not yet PASSed. 449c and 455a remain held until that V_s end-to-end validation lands. All four held-ERROR entries are now visible in discussed_experiment_dirs so they will not re-appear in pending_review.md.

Governance cycle reviewing 3 PASS pending experiments. (1) V3-EXQ-500a SD-017 sleep-phase readiness probe (Phase 2 successor to V3-EXQ-500): 3/3 seeds PASS C1+C2+C3 under the validated 5-flag substrate template; classified as evidence supporting SD-017 (already stable). Predecessor V3-EXQ-500 manifest marked evidence_direction=superseded. (2) V3-EXQ-543 ARC-062 Phase 2a monomodal-collapse falsifier: already reclassified non_contributory in the manifest (session exq543-reclassify 2026-05-10T04:23Z) due to three issues (C3 divide-by-near-zero artifact, ARM_1c seed 2 byte-identical to baseline from inert untrained gating, C2 state-dependence FAILED). Successor V3-EXQ-543b is in Phase 3 with gated_policy in optimizer + phased training. No claim weighting. (3) V3-EXQ-503a SD-017 sleep-vs-no-sleep discriminative pair (Phase 2 successor to V3-EXQ-503): 3/3 seeds PASS C1+C2+C3+C4; clean cross-arm dissociation (ARM_A 24 SWS writes / 18 REM rollouts / ctxmem_state_change 5.0 vs ARM_B all zero); per-seed M2 |diff| = [5.03, 4.70, 4.50] >> 0.20 tolerance; classified as evidence supporting SD-017 (already stable). Predecessor V3-EXQ-503 manifest marked evidence_direction=superseded. Decision queue: 13 pending_user recommendations applied (10 hold_pending_v3_substrate on ARC-062/064/065, MECH-309/312/313/316/317/318, SD-054 newly registered v3_pending claims; 3 hold_candidate_resolve_conflict on ARC-045, MECH-166, MECH-204 above conflict-ratio threshold). No claims.yaml status edits required -- all recommendations are holds, not status changes.

discussion_notes.context: Marked 4 unclaimed-manifest PASS runs discussed. These were invisible to pending_review until generate_pending_review.py was patched to surface PASS/FAIL manifests on disk whose run_id is absent from claim_evidence (substrate-readiness probes that tag no claims, or runs mis-logged ERROR/UNKNOWN by the runner while the manifest landed cleanly). Discussed at manifest-stem level because queue_id-level discussion is unsafe when runner_status disagrees with the manifest.
discussion_notes.patch: scripts/generate_pending_review.py: added load_unclaimed_manifests() + new section 4 'Unclaimed manifests (PASS/FAIL with no claim tags)'. Result detection accepts top-level result/verdict OR metrics.overall_pass.

results_summary.v3_exq_521_reef_enrichment_substrate_rea: 4-arm reef substrate validation: C0-C6 all pass; obs_dim 250->275 with reef present; 0 reef violations across arms; reef_visits ~2000 in reef arms.
results_summary.v3_exq_522_reef_monostrategy_break: 3-arm: C1-C6 all pass; position-entropy 3.66 (baseline) -> 1.96/2.66 (reef); zone-transitions/ep 49 vs 36; reef-visit fraction ~0.50.
results_summary.v3_exq_542_arc062_gated_policy_substrate: ARC-062 Phase 1 substrate wiring: 5 UCs pass (instantiation, master OFF no-op, discriminator input sensitivity, head differentiation under training ratio 7.78, MECH-094 sim gate). Does NOT test ARC-062 weak-reading or MECH-309 logical-necessity -- those need Phase 2 monomodal-collapse falsifier on SD-054.
results_summary.v3_exq_544_mech313_noise_floor_substrate: MECH-313 stochastic noise floor wiring + Pull 1 SYNTHESIS R4 verdict: 5 UCs pass (forward-pass instantiation, master OFF no-op, effective-temperature lift correctness across alpha/min_T/baseline sweep, MECH-094 sim gate). Does NOT test MECH-313 vs MECH-260 distinction -- needs Q-045 4-arm ablation on the new substrate.

discussion_notes.subject: V3-EXQ-461 EXP-0157 delayed-reward persistence substrate-readiness PASS reviewed. All six deterministic sub-tests passed: MECH-090 baseline Hold suppresses propagation for 12/12 synthetic delay ticks and releases only on high terminal completion; weakened/no-Hold contrast passes through 12/12 ticks; SD-033a rule_state persists under MECH-261 replay gate with cosine 0.995 to installed state while full distractor writes overwrite it (cosine -0.837); strengthened Hold resists moderate completion at threshold 0.95 and releases at 0.99; sd_033a gate table matches external_task=1.0, internal_replay=0.05, offline_consolidation=0.3; SD-034 terminal closure releases beta, injects 3 No-Go entries, writes closure_event, and resets dACC PE. Evidence_direction=supports for MECH-090, SD-033a, SD-034 at substrate-readiness level. commitment_closure_plan.md GAP-2 can be marked done for V3 substrate-readiness; full delayed-reward behavioural arm remains blocked on GAP-3 CausalGridWorldV2 env extensions.

manifest_reclassifications: v3_exq_549_arc066_tonic_vigor_discriminative_pair_20260511T190124Z_v3: weakens -> non_contributory (ARC-066 + MECH-320). v_t stayed 0.0 in ARM_ON (score-receipt never activated); seed42 action_density saturated at 1.0, seed43 at 0.0 with only 210 ticks. No discriminative surface. Rung-2 calibration failure, not a substrate failure. C3 gate_product=1.0 confirms gating architecture correct.

v3_exq_540e_mech307_default_fix_validation_20260512T085927Z_v3: evidence_direction_note added. Formal FAIL caused by seed44 early termination (134 ticks), not by the default fix failing. Seeds 42 and 43 both cleared C2 conjunction_fire_rate >= 0.1 (0.101 and 0.115). Default fix validated at 2/3 seeds. MECH-295 weakens reflects approach_commit_rate=1.0 saturation (measurement problem, not substrate failure).
discussion_notes.subject: Review of 12 pending experiments as part of calibration-debt intake session. Monostrategy cluster (552/555/557/558): 80% of agent seeds collapse; agent-init (not env) is the driver; even escaping seed7 has near-identical candidates (pairwise L2 ~1.8e-4), so behavioral diversity must come from something downstream of the proposer. EXQ-549 (MECH-320 tonic vigor): reclassified non_contributory -- v_t=0.0 throughout is a Rung-2 calibration failure (score-receipt path never activated), not evidence the mechanism is wrong. EXQ-550 (MECH-269): FAIL=supports -- z_goal wired but inactive, monostrategy survives, supports the substrate-ceiling reading. EXQ-543d (ARC-062): all-D-null factorial -- dACC made zero difference (ARM_1 identical to baseline), gating became inert (n_inert_gating_seeds=3 in ARM_2/3); routes to head-input augmentation before behavioural testing is fair. EXQ-540 cluster: 540a/b substrate dissociation PASS but conjunction never fires (drive gate root cause); 540c read-site probe confirmed the diagnosis; 540e default fix worked in 2/3 seeds (seed44 truncation blocked formal C2). Context: calibration_debt_index.md and Work Packages A-E to be created in follow-on session.

WPC Rung 1 diagnostic (EXQ-562) reviewed. P1 FAIL: goal component range ~3.8e-5 vs score range ~0.035 (~0.1% contribution). z_goal injection working (P3 PASS, norm=1.0 in forced arms). Goal weight doubling produces monotone range increase (P2 PASS). But monostrategy persists (action_class_entropy=0.0 across all 4 arms and both seeds). P1 FAIL interpretation: goal scoring seam is live but negligibly weak -- E3's harm/world costs overwhelm the goal component structurally. WPC Rung 2 will investigate WHY goal component is so small (e.g. dramatically higher goal_weight arms, or E3 score decomposition).

WPB heartbeat (EXQ-561) and candidate-support repair series (EXQ-563/563a/563b) reviewed. EXQ-561 PASS/non_contributory: all 6 arms entropy=0.0, unique_actions=1 across both seeds. CEM collapse blocks every arm identically; MECH-313/314/320 modules fire but have nothing to amplify. MECH-320 v_raw=-69.6 (sign/scale bug confirmed). EXQ-563 series: 563=diagnosis (CEM collapse confirmed, E3 score-bias seam independently live), 563a=scaffold actuator (forced bias moves action under scaffold), 563b=support-preserving CEM repair. 563b key finding: even with 5-class scaffold support (candidate entropy=0.55), E3 raw score range ~20-37 overwhelms weak bias (10 scale). Bias must be 30-100 to reliably override E3 learned preference. Root cause: E3 has trained into a genuine monostrategy from lack of diverse waking training data -- score advantage 35x over alternatives. Not a plumbing failure. Fix requires waking diversity first (ARC-065 precondition for all downstream). WPD GAP-2 (SD-017 retest) remains upstream-blocked; proceeding to ARC-065-independent WPD work (GAP-8 routing-consumer, GAP-6 StepHarness audit, GAP-7 driver pattern).

Governance cycle 2026-05-15. EXQ-563 cluster (4 runs): all confirmed diagnostic non_contributory. 563/563a additionally marked superseded (563a supersedes 563, 563b supersedes 563a). Key finding: E3 score-bias seam intact; CEM elite-refit collapse is the upstream blocker; MECH-320 v_raw magnitude (~-25 to -50) too small relative to E3 score range (~20-37) for natural v_t to shift behaviour. V3-EXQ-563c (stratified support-preserving CEM) already queued. EXQ-565 (MECH-272, GAP-8): PASS, evidence_direction=supports. Routing-gate consumer correctly modulates sws_anchor_weight from 1.0 (consumer OFF) to 0.6 (consumer ON), both seeds. MECH-272 remains hold_pending_v3_substrate (v3_pending gate). EXQ-564 (runner-only, WPC Rung 2): PASS diagnostic, claim_ids=[]. ValenceWanting write->read seam confirmed; ARM_2 forced_low mean_wanting=599, ARM_1 natural=6.2. Cleared to discussed_experiment_dirs. Promotion/demotion: 9 hold_pending_v3_substrate items applied (ARC-066/067/068, ARC-070/071, MECH-320, Q-043/044/045).

Governance cycle 2026-05-15 (evening). EXQ-540f marked superseded: C1 criterion (arm0_liking_writes==0) was unfulfillable; V3-EXQ-540g (delta-based C1, already running) supersedes it. C2 data confirms MECH-307 conjunction wiring is live (fire_rate=32.0 in ARM_2). EXQ-563c (ARC-065/MECH-320): diagnostic PASS, non_contributory confirmed, 7-arm CEM/bias wiring verified. EXQ-567 (ARC-065): evidence PASS, first exp support for ARC-065; entropy lift 0.484 (>>0.05 threshold), support lift 1.803 (>>0.5 threshold). ARC-065 remains hold_pending_v3_substrate. EXQ-568x2 (SD-055): dual substrate-readiness PASS, gradient confirmed (grad_max=372.06), non_contributory. Two runs identical (simultaneous claim on two machines). V3-EXQ-554 (runner-only ERROR): cleared -- orphaned ree-cloud-1 runner_status entry from systemctl-killed run; V3-EXQ-554a (re-run) already reviewed. Promotion/demotion: 9 hold_pending_v3_substrate confirmed (ARC-066/067/068, ARC-070/071, MECH-320, Q-043/044/045) -- all v3_pending already set.

Governance cycle 2026-05-16 (evening, post-G3/G4 update). ARC-065 calibration cluster root-cause identified: EXQ-571 diagnostic proved all diversity bias components (dacc, lateral_pfc, ofc, curiosity, tonic_vigor) contribute 0.0 to E3 temporal variance -- forward model F dominates 88-89%. EXQ-569/572/573 all reclassified non_contributory (bias channel not propagating to selection). EXQ-570x3 (diagnostic PASS): E2 rollout diversity preservation 51x, confirming E2 is not the collapse site. EXQ-567 212425Z (ARC-065 PASS): second evidence run confirms entropy lift (previously 484, this run also PASS). EXQ-540g (MECH-307/MECH-295): PASS on C1+C2 (conjunction_fire_rate=32.0, liking_lift=+9); C3 ceiling effect (approach_commit=1.0) from environment, not mechanism failure -- classified partial support. EXQ-574 (MECH-273): PASS, loss converges 0.003->5e-5 over 3 sleep cycles, 3 seeds -- first experimental support for self-model aggregator. All remain hold_pending_v3_substrate. G4 heterogeneity_note added to SD-018 (ratio=1.0 substrate-version confound), SD-005 (ratio=0.917 design-failure cluster), ARC-024 (ratio=0.857 pre-split scope). Governance_agenda updated: 13 hold_pending_v3_substrate applied (ARC-066/067/068/070/071, MECH-314/314a/314b/314c, MECH-320, Q-043/044/045).

Failure autopsy session 2026-05-17T12:47Z (failure-autopsy-566-582).
